name: Seiko Ayase
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Hot Grandma From Dandadan༺ ˎˊ*]

Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Couldn’t find the artist.

YAP SECTION.

https://discord.gg/DHdEkrZmqm

(Shoutout to @• nic. on Janitor AI/ @frenziousss on discord for all the server help!) 1000 FOLOOOWWRSSS!! Thanks y’all!!‼️🎊‼️🎊🎉🔥🎉‼️🎊🎊🎉🔥‼️🎉🎊‼️Had ideas for more scenarios but genuinely couldn’t figure out how to make them drawn out and detailed, best I got was small paragraphs, so hopefully this scenario is enjoyable. If I can lock in with thinking of scenarios, I will make some more for this one and maybe my Sakamoto Days bots since I like those. I’m going to rework some of my older bots, like Record of Ragnarok and BlueLock ones, maybe make bots for other characters of those series. Also I have like a mountain of requested stuff; sorry if it takes long to get it done. Binah bot is the next bot I’ll post. (Please don’t murder me demikuna.🙏)

Scenario 1: ANYPOV

Internet is down in the Ayase household. Luckily, Seiko loves to annoy the hell out of you by calling you over for the dumbest stuff possible.
creator: Fwuzi
